message:
feat(wasm): add exports-map and tree-shake-safety contract tests (3qv04.4.2)

Add 8 new contract tests enforcing package exports-map invariants:
- sideEffects:false on all packages
- No internal/native/src subpath leaks
- TypeScript types condition ordering
- Shallow subpath depth constraint
- browser-core files↔exports bidirectional coverage
- ESM module type and publishConfig consistency

Total: 28 contract tests in wasm_package_build_contract.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
